name: Poonam Pandey
quote: The entire internet and all of India have been echoing with and clamoring about this protest. The public, these students are simply demanding an answer, and I have come here for that very reason; I genuinely request the government to please listen to them. They haven't eaten. Sonam Wangchuk is already unwell. I have come here to state one thing clearly: amidst everything we are seeing on the internet, the issue has been severely sidetracked. All sorts of things have crept in. The whole of India is shaken and becoming divided. Let us not do that. Let us not turn this into a religious or political issue. Let us avoid getting into who is doing what, who did what; that is wrong. This protest began because of the NEET exam paper leak. Today, the issue has shifted to something else.... I know it is a march tomorrow; there could be trouble or a lathi-charge and I am aware of that. But I am just praying that the students don't suffer any further. They are already in great distress...
